'''zayate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yuckily|yuckily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-y-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yuckily|yuckily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zayate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:zayate|zayate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zayatesher|zayatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zayatesherĂ«m|zayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zayatero|zayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zayateshĂ«|zayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zayateshĂ«m|zayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizayatero|gokizayatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizayateshĂ«|gokizayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizayateshĂ«m|gokizayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozayankerom|gozayankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozayankeshĂ«|gozayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozayankeshĂ«m|gozayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozayankeya|gozayankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zayaterom|zayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zayatemu|zayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zayateya|zayateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizayaterom|gokizayaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizayatemu|gokizayatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizayateya|gokizayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:zayayate|zayayate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zayayatesher|zayayatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zayayatesherĂ«m|zayayatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zayayatero|zayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zayayateshĂ«|zayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zayayateshĂ«m|zayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizayayatero|gokizayayatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizayayateshĂ«|gokizayayateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizayayateshĂ«m|gokizayayateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozayayankerom|gozayayankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozayayankeshĂ«|gozayayankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozayayankeshĂ«m|gozayayankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozayayankeya|gozayayankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zayayaterom|zayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zayayatemu|zayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zayayateya|zayayateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizayayaterom|gokizayayaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizayayatemu|gokizayayatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizayayateya|gokizayayateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:zĂŠyĂŠte|zĂŠyĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zĂŠyĂŠtesher|zĂŠyĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m|zĂŠyĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠyĂŠtero|zĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|zĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|zĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠyĂŠtero|gokizĂŠyĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«|gokizĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m|gokizĂŠyĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozĂŠyĂŠnkerom|gozĂŠyĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«|gozĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gozĂŠyĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozĂŠyĂŠnkeya|gozĂŠyĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zĂŠyĂŠterom|zĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zĂŠyĂŠtemu|zĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zĂŠyĂŠteya|zĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizĂŠyĂŠterom|gokizĂŠyĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizĂŠyĂŠtemu|gokizĂŠyĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizĂŠyĂŠteya|gokizĂŠyĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafyafte|zafyafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:zafyaftesher|zafyaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafyaftesherĂ«m|zafyaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafyaftero|zafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafyafteshĂ«|zafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafyafteshĂ«m|zafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafyaftero|gokizafyaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafyafteshĂ«|gokizafyafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafyafteshĂ«m|gokizafyafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gozafyafnkerom|gozafyafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafyafnkeshĂ«|gozafyafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafyafnkeshĂ«m|gozafyafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gozafyafnkeya|gozafyafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:zafyafterom|zafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafyaftemu|zafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:zafyafteya|zafyafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokizafyafterom|gokizafyafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafyaftemu|gokizafyaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokizafyafteya|gokizafyafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
